title: Fertility concern
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility
source.population: Individuals and couples being evaluated and managed for infertility.
source.setting: Primary, reproductive-health, fertility, and specialist services adaptable to national settings.
source.exclusions: Exact global guidance for infertility history, focused examination, diagnostic evaluation, and person-centred support; requires UAE adaptation and does not directly cover recurrent pregnancy loss as a separate presentation.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.

assessment.text: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.
assessment.rationale: Directly supports mapped BMI, thyroid, pelvic examination, semen, ovulation, tubal, uterine, and selected prior-test review.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.

assessment.text: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.
assessment.rationale: Directly supports mapped counselling, preferences, psychosocial support, referral discussion, and questions as clinician-documented decisions.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility

exact_location.heading: Chapter 3.3 — diagnosis discussion, psychosocial support, and shared decisions

source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.

assessment.text: Defines female, male, and unexplained-factor evaluation, menstrual-pattern context, ovulation confirmation, reproductive hormones, semen analysis, tubal assessment, and uterine-cavity assessment.
assessment.rationale: Directly supports mapped infertility evaluation terms and clinician-selected hormone, ultrasound, and semen-analysis review.
